response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and a demonstrated passion for tooling and developer productivity, but lacks direct, recent experience with JVM ecosystems, Spring, or enterprise IDE tooling — his Java exposure is historical and peripheral, while his recent work centers on TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js, making his fit for this role uncertain without deeper probing.
strengths: Proven track record in building developer tooling and IDE-adjacent systems (e.g., CI/CD, test runners, code generators)
Strong interest in software internals and education (e.g., Web Internals workshop, Refactoring Dojos)
Experience with large-scale, high-performance systems and cross-platform tooling across multiple languages
concerns: Minimal recent Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem experience; Java appears only as historical or minor component
No evidence of work on IDE internals, language servers, or JVM-based tooling pipelines
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — core requirements of the role are not clearly met
